issue_summary: Microsoft 365 is reporting an active service degradation affecting Exchange Online mailbox access in some connection methods, with third-party reporting indicating a broader M365 disruption under investigation.
impact: Email access and related support volume may spike across Microsoft 365 tenants; expect intermittent mailbox connectivity issues and user-facing Outlook/Exchange disruption.
status: Active degradation under investigation / partial outage
response_1: Check Microsoft 365 admin/service health for tenant-specific advisories and pause nonessential mailbox troubleshooting while platform validation is in progress.
response_2: Notify help desk and client-facing teams to expect Outlook/Exchange access complaints, document affected tenants, and steer users to retry rather than making risky local profile changes.
